_comment: Temporary: Packagist reads composer.json from the default branch at submission time to identify the package. The real package lives on the `composer` branch (generated from packaging/composer/ per release); this file can be removed once cresset/jibs is registered.
name: cresset/jibs
description: Selective, anonymized MySQL database imports from production to local dev over SSH. Follows foreign keys from a handful of rows instead of dumping everything. Fetches a prebuilt Rust binary on demand.
